specs.title: axe: kanban board view has no critical WCAG A/AA violations
axe: forge intake view has no critical WCAG A/AA violations
axe: forge preview view has no critical WCAG A/AA violations
axe: signals bar has no critical WCAG A/AA violations
page should have a main heading (h1) for the app title
page should have h2 or higher headings for major sections
navigation should use <nav> or role="navigation"
kanban columns should have region landmarks or section headings
signal list should use proper list semantics (ul/ol/role=list)
navbar tabs should use role="tablist" and role="tab"
all form inputs have associated labels
required fields should have aria-required="true"
select dropdowns have accessible names
signals add form inputs have associated labels
interview panel question groups should use fieldset/legend
error messages should be linked to inputs via aria-describedby
all buttons have accessible names — no icon-only buttons
expandable kanban cards have aria-expanded attribute
expandable plan editor phases have aria-expanded
navbar tab buttons use role="tab" with aria-selected
AdoCombobox has combobox ARIA pattern (role, aria-autocomplete, aria-controls)
AdoCombobox dropdown list has role="listbox"
signal checkboxes have accessible labels
tab key reaches the New Plan button from the start of the page
tab key reaches nav tabs (AI Kanban / The Forge)
focus is visible on interactive elements — outline not suppressed
expandable kanban cards can be toggled via Enter key
forge phase changes manage focus (focus moves to new content)
awaiting-human status indicator has text alternative
priority badges include text labels alongside colors
risk-level indicators include text labels not just colors
disabled Generate Plan button is indicated by more than opacity alone
connection indicator has text alternative (not color dot only)
loading state for board fetch uses aria-live or role="status"
error banner uses role="alert" for immediate announcement
forge generation spinner/status announced via aria-live
connection mode changes have aria-live announcement
signal count badge on Signals button is in an aria-live region
plan saved confirmation is announced via role="alert" or aria-live
button is visible on expanded card with steps_total > 0
button is absent on expanded card with steps_total === 0
clicking Edit Plan opens the Forge view
Forge is pre-populated with the card context after Edit Plan click
Re-forge button still present when Edit Plan is shown
button only appears on the card that has a plan when both are expanded
Escape hotkey returns to kanban after Edit Plan navigation

suites.title: Forge — Back to Plan from interview phase

specs.title: back-to-plan button is visible above the interview form
top back-to-plan button returns to preview with plan intact
interview panel cancel button returns to preview with plan intact
plan can be approved after cancelling the interview
can re-enter interview after cancelling once
expanding card A then card B — card A should collapse (single expanded card at a time)
filter by program then unfilter — all cards reappear
toggle signals on → navigate to forge → come back → signals toggle state is preserved
start generating plan → navigate away to board → come back → forge is in intake phase (not stuck in generating)
edit forge form description → navigate to board → come back → form data is preserved via localStorage
select signals → navigate away → come back → signals bar state is checked for consistency
change view while plan is generating — generation completes correctly after returning to forge

suites.title: Category 2: Edge Cases in Data Display

specs.title: card with empty title renders without crash — no empty-string JS error
card with 200+ char title — title is clamped, no layout overflow
card with no steps — progress pips area is absent (not broken with empty render)
card with 50 steps — progress pips render without horizontal overflow
card with no program name — program dot renders with fallback hash, no crash
health bar with 0% completion — bar renders with zero-width fill, no NaN
health bar with 100% completion — bar renders correctly
health bar with 20+ programs — horizontal scroll works, no layout break
signal with empty description — signal row renders without crash
signal with extremely long title — title does not overflow the signals bar
plan with 0 phases — PlanEditor renders stats bar showing "0" phases without crash
plan with 20 phases — all phase headers render, scroll works
plan with phase having 30 steps — expanding phase shows all 30 steps
plan step with empty description — step renders without crash, edit works
all 50 cards in one column — board renders without layout break
empty board — all columns show Empty placeholder
card with long error message — error is truncated at 80 chars, no layout break
double-click on card expand — no race condition, card ends up in a consistent state
rapid-fire clicks on New Plan button — switches to forge, no crash
click execute on queued card → click again before first completes — second click is ignored (button disabled)
click Approve & Queue → click again before save completes — duplicate submit is prevented
type in forge description while plan is generating — textarea should NOT be interactive during generation
delete all phases in plan editor — PlanEditor renders with 0 phases, Approve still works
delete all steps from a phase — phase shows empty step list with Add step button
reorder steps when only 1 step — move up/down buttons are both disabled
click Resolve on signal → immediately click Forge on same signal — signal disappears or stays consistently
select all signals → deselect one → select all again — selectAll checkbox state is correct
type in ADO search → clear → type again rapidly — no stale requests render old results
board with 50+ cards — main layout does not exceed viewport height
ForgePanel with very long project names — project select renders without overflow
SignalsBar with 20+ signals — bar stays within max-height with scroll
AdoCombobox dropdown near edge of screen — dropdown visible and not clipped at 768px
PlanEditor with deeply nested phase names — phase header text fits within accordion
board API returns empty object {} instead of BoardResponse — UI shows empty board gracefully
board API returns 500 — error banner is shown with retry message
forge generate returns 500 — error message shown in forge panel, still in intake phase
forge approve returns 500 — save error displayed in preview phase, plan is NOT lost
signal resolve returns 500 — signal remains in list (optimistic update is NOT applied)
ADO search returns empty results — no results message or empty dropdown (not broken)
ADO search returns 500 — no crash, dropdown closed, form remains usable
SSE connection drops — polling fallback indicator shows "polling" mode
multiple rapid board API errors — error banner appears once, not stacked
card detail API returns 500 when clicking View Plan — graceful "No plan available" fallback
navigate through the entire app — no console.error events
generate and approve a plan — no console.error events throughout forge workflow
interact with signals — no console.error events during signal workflow
priority chip display — P0 chip shown for priority=2, P1 chip for priority=1, no chip for priority=0
back-to-board with dirty plan — confirm dialog fires, cancel keeps user in forge
back-to-board with dirty plan — confirm dialog fires, OK navigates to kanban
add step then immediately remove it — step count decrements correctly
regenerate → interview panel → back to plan → plan is still intact
hotkey ESC on forge — navigates back to kanban when NOT dirty
signals badge count updates when signals panel opens and a signal is resolved

suites.title: Journey 1: Create a new plan from scratch

specs.title: step count from New Plan click to Forge intake is at most 1 interaction
phase label is always visible during Forge flow — breadcrumb orientation
Generate button disabled when description is empty — validation feedback
error during generation shows clear message and returns to intake with form intact
after approval the next action (Start Execution) is above the fold
back button from preview shows dirty-state confirmation prompt
Edit Intake back button in preview does not require confirmation

suites.title: Journey 2: Find and act on a specific card

specs.title: cards show title and status at a glance without expanding
action buttons become visible only after expanding — discoverability issue
expanded card clearly shows which column it belongs to
Execute button provides clear feedback on success
View Plan loads and shows meaningful content — not just spinner
card ID in monospace is cryptic — human-readable context should accompany it
signals toggle reveals the signal bar within 1 click
signal descriptions are not truncated beyond readability in the panel
signal IDs shown in the panel are truncated to 12 chars — cryptic
select-all checkbox is discoverable and positioned near signals
batch resolve button appears immediately when a signal is selected
forging from a signal closes signals panel and pre-fills description
resolving a signal removes it from the list — no manual refresh needed
critical signals are visually differentiated from medium/low
health bar is immediately visible without interaction
completion percentage has sufficient context — users know what 25% means
blocked indicator in health bar is visible and actionable
clicking health bar program card filters the board to that program
health bar shows meaningful zero-state when no programs are tracked
path from card to plan editor requires minimum 2 clicks
step editing is triggered by click-to-edit with no visible edit button
step reorder buttons are small and easy to miss
saving plan edits has no explicit save button — changes are in-memory only
removing the last step from a phase leaves an empty phase without warning

suites.title: Journey 6: Regenerate a plan with feedback

specs.title: regenerate interview questions are clear and provide skip option
choice buttons in interview are clearly selectable and show selected state
regeneration progress indicator is visible during re-generation
cancelling regeneration from interview returns to preview with plan intact
Forge form description is persisted after switching to board and back
keyboard hotkey n switches to Forge and back with Escape
hotkey s toggles signals panel
tab order allows keyboard-only navigation through the main toolbar
program filter state persists after navigating to Forge and back
both views render simultaneously but only the active one is interactive
board load failure shows error banner with retry information
board error banner shows polling fallback mode — not just a red banner
plan generation failure allows retry with same form data
plan approval failure keeps the plan preview intact — not lost
signal resolve failure is silent — no error feedback to user
batch resolve failure is silent — same UX problem as individual resolve
ADO search failure has no visible error — combobox silently shows nothing
keyboard shortcut hints are discoverable
empty columns show a meaningful empty state, not blank space
connection indicator is unambiguous about its meaning
the Forge title "The Forge" is opaque — phase subtitle carries all orientation
plan stats bar in editor shows meaningful values not just numbers
approved plan shows saved file path in monospace — too technical for a success screen
C1.1 — long card title — line-clamp does not cut mid-word
C1.2 — card_id format — monospace text is distinguishable from title
C1.3 — priority chip P0 shows for priority=2, P1 for priority=1, nothing for priority=0
C1.4 — error message truncation at 80 chars — key info lost?
C1.5 — progress pips with 20 steps — do they overflow the card width?
C1.6 — card step count "N/M" always shown alongside pips for readability
C1.7 — card with zero steps shows no pips and no step text
C1.8 — last-updated time shows as HH:MM time, not epoch/ISO/undefined
C1.9 — agents list truncated in footer shows "+N more" indicator
C1.10 — expanded card agent chips use technical names, not friendly labels
C1.11 — View Plan button in expanded card loads plan preview
C1.12 — current_phase text truncated at 65 chars — truncation indicator present
C2.1 — percentage value has no label — what does it measure?
C2.2 — stats sum check: total_plans = active + completed + blocked + failed
C2.3 — empty health bar (no programs) shows helpful message, not blank
C2.4 — blocked count is highlighted differently from active count
C2.5 — failed count is shown with red color, distinct from blocked
C2.6 — program with 0 plans still shows a card (not silently hidden)
C3.1 — plan preview stat tiles: long task_id value does not overflow container
C3.2 — plan with no task_summary still shows phases (no blank void)
C3.3 — generic phase names "Phase 1" / "Phase 2" provide no context
C3.4 — gate badge is visible on phase with gate; no badge on gate-free phase
C3.5 — stats bar shows Phases/Steps/Gates/Risk; Risk is color-coded
C3.6 — after plan approval, save path is displayed in monospace and is non-empty
C3.7 — Start Execution button in saved phase is clearly labeled with action consequence
C3.8 — generation error message is displayed in the error banner
C3.9 — large plan (12 phases) renders all phase headers without scrolling past viewport
C4.1 — signal severity badge is text-labeled, not color-only
C4.2 — signal_id truncated to 12 chars — loses meaning for long machine-generated IDs
C4.3 — signal description is truncated to 160px width with ellipsis
C4.4 — signal type "stale_plan" / "missing_gate" shown as raw machine label
C4.5 — "N open" signal count in header matches visible signal rows
C4.6 — after resolving a signal, its row disappears and count updates
C4.7 — signals bar with 15+ signals — scrollable without information collapse
C5.1 — connection indicator shows text label, not just a color dot
C5.2 — error banner shows retry interval clearly
C5.3 — generating state shows spinner text, not a frozen UI
C5.4 — empty column placeholder shows "Empty" text, not blank space
C5.5 — forge generating phase has a cancel button to exit
C6.1 — step IDs show auto-generated format (N.M) and are readable
C6.2 — agent dropdown options are raw technical names with no descriptions
C6.3 — adding a step updates the Steps stat tile immediately
C6.4 — step description inline edit: save is implicit (blur or Enter)
C6.5 — removing all steps from a phase leaves an empty expandable phase
C7.1 — kanban card with all metadata (error + phase + priority + risk + agents) is still scannable
C7.2 — board with 20 cards across columns — important states still distinguishable
C7.3 — forge intake form with all fields visible — priority field is clear

dirty dot appears after editing a step description

draft restore banner appears after navigating away and back

dismiss button hides the banner and clears the draft

screenshot utility works for forge view
app base url is reachable or server is not running

health bar cards scroll horizontally at narrow viewport

navbar at mobile 375px — tabs do not overflow or overlap
multi-viewport screenshot comparison — full page at all 3 breakpoints
card click expands details section
card hover shows visual feedback — border color changes on hover
program filter toggles correctly — filter on, then filter off returns to all
multiple rapid filter clicks do not break state
signals toggle shows signals bar then hides it on second click
New Plan button switches to Forge view
phase transitions: intake to generating — header phase label updates

phase header click expands the phase accordion

step description click enables inline edit mode
reorder up button disabled for first step
reorder down button disabled for last step in phase

Kanban column spacing is consistent — columns ordered left-to-right
card padding is consistent — cards have non-zero padding
typography hierarchy — title font-size larger than metadata font-size

hover state — New Plan button has cursor:pointer

suites.title: Suite 8: Known UX Issues — Audit Verification

specs.title: execution result has no dismiss mechanism — known issue
AdoCombobox has no arrow-key navigation — known issue
color-only awaiting_human status — orange dot has no accessible label
Forge intake form — labels not connected to inputs via label element
no unsaved changes indicator in Forge when description modified
batch resolve signals — executes without confirmation dialog
